title: fragaria stipularis
intro: Fragaria stipularis is a species of strawberry native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico, known for its small, edible fruits and medicinal properties. The plant has been traditionally used for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, particularly in treating wounds and skin irritations. The health benefits of Fragaria stipularis include its ability to reduce swelling and promote healing, making it a valuable treatment for conditions such as eczema and dermatitis. Herbal preparations of Fragaria stipularis can be made into salves, tinctures, and infusions, allowing for its medicinal properties to be harnessed in a variety of applications.
